_note: Verified deployment addresses on Robinhood Chain. SushiSwap CLAMM (SushiSwap V3) is a Uniswap v3 fork — its NonfungiblePositionManager is what UniswapV3GraduationHandler targets for the rug-proof graduation (seed pool + burn LP). Source: https://docs.sushi.com/contracts/clamm (docs last updated 2026-07-14).
weth: TODO — wrapped-ETH (WETH9) address on Robinhood Chain; needed by the graduation handler. Find on docs.robinhood.com or the Sushi token list.

sushiV3Clamm.graduationFeeTierNote: 0.3% / 60 tick-spacing — matches UniswapV3GraduationHandler's TICK_LOWER/UPPER (±887220). Confirm this tier is enabled on the factory before mainnet.
